_note: CHARACTER_VOCABULARY_V2.md §6 Subset D, D1-D34 (Life & Bonds). All render:false (chat-side; Stage-6 persona injection / §9 RAG seed). D18 companion pairs with a conditional 'companion_name' free-text slot (flag 10) handled by the creator free-text field set - not a group here. The D-vi scenario-builder handoff (relationship/how_met/meeting_scene/scene_tone/time_weather/event_seeds/user_persona) is home:builder / Stage-6 §13 and is NOT authored here. Mem provisional (flag 1); fragments best-effort, re-cut at 6d. Caps and O* defaults documented per group but unenforced (no format key).
